name: Jessica Kirson
bio: Jessica Kirson is an American stand-up comedian known for animated characters, muttered asides to herself, and confessional material about her Jewish upbringing, sobriety, and identity as a lesbian. A staple of New York clubs, she released the Comedy Central special Talking to Myself in 2019 and has built a large following through viral crowd-work clips. Her comedy pairs broad physicality with sharp, self-deprecating honesty.

timeline.ev: Born in South Orange, New Jersey
Acts in and consults on the film The Comedian
Releases Comedy Central special Talking to Myself
Appears in and produces the documentary Hysterical

accolades: Comedy Central hour Talking to Myself, executive produced by Bill Burr (2019)
Executive producer of the documentary Hysterical (2021)

bits.t: If You Don't Laugh, I'll Eat You
